system.damage: whirlwind of pecks, claws, buffets d8+3 (hand, area, disadvantage)
system.moves:
- Manifest in a murmuration of starlings (nigh impossible to harm with personal weapons)
- Strip a swath of land clean of seed, saplings, insects
- Overwhelm with sound and the weight of numbers

When the sun sets, starlings flock in absurd numbers: thousands upon thou- sands dancing and wheeling in the sky, like a chittering thunderhead, like a cloud of living smoke. Farmers do what they can to keep starlings far from town, and not just because they eat precious seeds and bury the land in drop- pings. They do so for fear of the grwgnach.
